bead.title: auth-schema: control-plane migrations for tenancy/auth tables
bead.description:
Add migrations for: tenants, users, user_identities, tenant_users, tenant_databases, credential_revocations. Enforce UNIQUE(tenants.name), UNIQUE(user_identities.provider, external_id), PK(tenant_users.tenant_id, user_id). Runs on SQLite + Postgres. (audit_retention_policies is NOT in scope — it belongs to F1 audit-attribution.)

Depends on: nothing (blocks A2 and everything downstream).

Test as you implement:
- Round-trip test per table: insert full row, SELECT back, assert columns match
- Constraint tests: attempt duplicate inserts, verify rejection
- Both backends: SQLite unit tests + Postgres testcontainers tests (use the pattern from crates/axon-storage/tests/postgres_tenant_isolation.rs — skip gracefully if container runtime unavailable)
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] Migration applies to empty SQLite + Postgres DB
- [ ] Re-applying migration is idempotent (no errors, no duplicate rows)
- [ ] UNIQUE(tenants.name) rejects duplicate tenant names
- [ ] UNIQUE(user_identities.provider, external_id) rejects duplicate federation rows
- [ ] PK(tenant_users.tenant_id, user_id) rejects duplicate memberships
- [ ] Round-trip test per table (insert + SELECT) green
- [ ] No audit_retention_policies table present (F1 territory)
- [ ] SQLite unit tests green
- [ ] Postgres testcontainers tests green (or gracefully skip)
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-storage green
